# Acme Knowledge Base

> Internal handbook backed by Notion, mirrored to ACT (Agent Content Tree) for AI-agent consumption.

---
title: Onboarding checklist
url: http://localhost:8083/act/nodes/kb%2Fen-us%2Faaaaaaaa-0001-4000-8000-000000000001.json
type: article
locale: en-US
summary: Day-one and week-one tasks for every new engineer joining the platform team.
---

Day one

Welcome to the platform team. The first day is mostly accounts, hardware, and meeting your immediate group.

- Confirm laptop, badge, and Yubikey.
- Schedule 1:1s with manager and tech lead.
- Run the bootstrap script and confirm a green CI build.

```bash
git clone git@github.com:acme/platform.git
cd platform
./scripts/bootstrap.sh
make test
```


---
title: Production deploy runbook
url: http://localhost:8083/act/nodes/kb%2Fen-us%2Faaaaaaaa-0002-4000-8000-000000000002.json
type: article
locale: en-US
summary: Step-by-step procedure for releasing the API service to production, including rollback.
---

Pre-flight checks

Confirm staging is healthy and that the change-log entry has been merged before promoting an artefact to production.

1. Run the smoke suite against staging.
1. Promote the artefact via the deploy CLI.
1. Watch the canary dashboard for 10 minutes before scaling.

```bash
deploy promote --service api --from staging --to prod --canary 5
```


---
title: Troubleshooting common errors
url: http://localhost:8083/act/nodes/kb%2Fen-us%2Faaaaaaaa-0003-4000-8000-000000000003.json
type: article
locale: en-US
summary: Recipes for the five errors that most often page the on-call rotation.
---

Top five incidents

These five errors account for roughly 80% of the on-call pages over the past quarter; the remediation is short in each case.

- DB connection pool exhausted -> restart the worker pool.
- Stale CDN cache -> purge the affected path.

```bash
ops cdn purge --path /api/v1/items
```


---
title: Security and access policy
url: http://localhost:8083/act/nodes/kb%2Fen-us%2Faaaaaaaa-0004-4000-8000-000000000004.json
type: article
locale: en-US
summary: How we handle credentials, secrets, and least-privilege access across services.
---

Credentials and secrets

All long-lived credentials live in the central vault. Local development uses short-lived OIDC tokens issued by the auth proxy.

- Never commit a token to git, even in a private repo.
- Rotate any token whose audit log shows an unrecognised consumer.

```bash
vault login -method=oidc role=engineer
vault kv get secret/api/db
```


---
title: Lista de incorporación
url: http://localhost:8083/act/nodes/kb%2Fes-es%2Faaaaaaaa-0005-4000-8000-000000000005.json
type: article
locale: es-ES
summary: Tareas de la primera semana para cada ingeniero que se incorpora al equipo de plataforma.
---

Primer día

Bienvenido al equipo de plataforma. El primer día se centra en cuentas, hardware y conocer al equipo inmediato.

- Confirma laptop, gafete y Yubikey.
- Programa 1:1 con manager y tech lead.

```bash
git clone git@github.com:acme/platform.git
cd platform
./scripts/bootstrap.sh
```
